_doc: F.0 props-parity config. How props_check.mjs maps a kit .d.ts prop-set to a Flutter widget constructor param-set before diffing. Schema + rationale: tool/parity/README.md. Verified against components/{core,navigation,surfaces}/*.d.ts + lib/presentation/shared/**. Add a NEW alias only when it is a real convention (applies to many components); a one-off belongs in props-parity.exceptions.json, not here.

fileAlias._comment: kit component key (relativeDir/PascalName) -> Flutter class+file when the default snake_case(PascalName) diverges. Key uses the kit dir so same-named components in different dirs (game-recall/TermCard vs review/TermCard) stay distinct.

propNameAlias._comment: web .d.ts prop name -> ordered list of accepted Flutter param names. A kit prop is SATISFIED if the ctor declares ANY name in its list. 'children'/'label' resolve to text (label/text) OR a node slot (child); the checker picks whichever the ctor actually has.
label: label
text
title

propDrop._comment: web-only props with no Flutter meaning. Present in .d.ts (correct for the kit) but the checker drops them before diffing — never a MISSING_IN_FLUTTER. Reason class: web-only.

typeMap._comment: web .d.ts type -> Flutter type, for the OPTIONALITY/type dimension. icon strings (Material Symbols name) become IconData; ReactNode slots become Widget; callbacks become VoidCallback.

enumValueAlias._comment: kit union literal -> Flutter enum value name (naming only; membership/extra-value is judged by the checker). 'kebabToCamel: true' additionally normalizes any 'a-b-c' literal to 'aBC' generically, so only truly irregular names need listing here.

enumBaseNote: Flutter enums frequently add ONE base value the kit expresses by omitting the prop (kit tone 'success|warning|error' -> MxBadgeTone {neutral,success,warning,error}; kit variant 'accent|ghost' -> MxChipVariant {standard,accent,ghost}). The checker does NOT auto-accept extra Flutter enum values — each extra must be recorded once in props-parity.exceptions.json with reason 'enum-base-expansion'. This keeps the map naming-only and forces extras to be reviewed.

diffDimensions._comment: what props_check compares after aliasing. Each can be advisory (P0/P1) or blocking (after Z.0).
diffDimensions.MISSING_IN_FLUTTER: kit prop (post-alias, post-drop) has no matching Flutter param
diffDimensions.EXTRA_IN_FLUTTER: Flutter param with no kit prop and not a declared base/flutter-only exception
diffDimensions.ENUM_MISMATCH: kit union values (post enumValueAlias) not a subset of Flutter enum values, or vice-versa beyond a declared base
diffDimensions.OPTIONALITY_MISMATCH: kit '?:' optional vs Flutter 'required'/non-null (or kit required vs Flutter optional-with-default)
